name: Reverse-Grip Cable Lat Pulldown
shortDescription: A cable pulldown variation using an underhand (supinated) grip to emphasize the lower lats and biceps.
instructions: Sit at a lat pulldown station and grasp the bar with a reverse (underhand) grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Pull the bar down to your upper chest, squeezing the shoulder blades together, then slowly return to starting position.
steps: Set the cable bar attachment and sit with knees secured under the pad.
Grasp the bar with a reverse (supinated) shoulder-width grip.
Lean back slightly, chest up, arms fully extended.
Pull the bar down to your upper chest by contracting your lats.
Slowly return the bar to the start position with control.
breathing: Exhale as you pull down, inhale as you return up.
